## Goal

## Plan References

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Mock mode remains safe and usable without paid API keys.
- [ ] No outbound email, contact-form submission, document upload, payment action, account creation, CAPTCHA bypass, or login-wall bypass occurs unless explicitly in scope and approval-gated.
- [ ] Relevant audit/logging behavior is covered or explicitly deferred.
- [ ] Tests or verification steps are included.

## Notes

Record product, safety, or architecture constraints that should not drift during implementation.
